summary: This release restores time-based search filters, refines citation formatting to reduce clutter, and ensures follow-up suggestions load reliably.

entries.title: Time-based query filters restored
entries.description: Temporal queries like "last 6 months" or "since 2026" now correctly filter search results based on document publication dates instead of searching the entire catalog.

entries.title: Scope notifications for fallback searches
entries.description: When a filtered search (by product or date) yields no results, the application now explicitly notifies you that the search has expanded to include the broader documentation corpus.

entries.title: Clearer citation panel excerpts
entries.description: Citation snippets in the side panel now display the actual content body of source documents rather than repetitive structural headers and titles.

entries.title: Deduplicated documentation versions in citations
entries.description: The citation panel now groups multiple versions of the same document topic into a single entry referencing the newest version, reducing visual noise.

entries.title: Scrollable citation panel on small screens
entries.description: Fixed an issue where citation lists containing more than six sources were cut off and unscrollable on smaller monitors or windows.

entries.title: Reliable follow-up suggestion rendering
entries.description: Follow-up question chips now automatically retry loading during rapid usage, preventing blank suggestion spaces caused by transient rate limits.

entries.title: Elevated response generation latency
entries.description: Answers currently take between 18 and 28 seconds to fully generate, primarily due to large language model processing times.

entries.title: Experimental real-time response streaming
entries.description: Support for streaming responses is planned for an upcoming release to allow you to read answers progressively as they are being generated.

entries.title: Version-specific filtering unavailable for XSIAM
entries.description: Queries targeting specific Cortex XSIAM version numbers will search across all XSIAM documentation, as XSIAM documentation is structured by date rather than version.

entries.title: Limited documentation coverage for AgentiX
entries.description: Because Cortex AgentiX is a newly launched platform, documentation coverage is currently limited, and some queries may draw from general XSOAR documentation instead.
